name: Lamb Teriyaki with Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Lean cooked leg of lamb
12 oz Small washed whole mushrooms, quartered and separated from stems
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 2-inch cubes and discard any fat.
2. Combine the lamb with soy sauce, wine, ginger, and garlic in a plastic bag set into a bowl. Marinate for two hours or longer in the refrigerator.
3. Reserve the marinade. Thread the meat onto skewers, alternating with mushrooms and onion leaves.
4. Wipe gently with salad oil.
5. Broil 4 inches from the heat for 3-4 minutes on each side, basting occasionally with marinade.
